title: Tensor Lab: Minimal-Multiplication Bilinear Decomposition of a Planted Overcomplete Tensor
strategies: trivial mode-c flattening: one rank-1 term e_i (x) e_j (x) fibre per nonzero (i,j) fibre (R = a*b)
greedy best-of-three flattening: place the two unit vectors on the mode-pair with the fewest nonzero fibres (R = min(a*b, b*c, a*c))
strong exact slice-rank: slice along the mode minimizing the summed rational slice ranks, then rank-1-factor each slice exactly (R = sum_k rank(slice_k))
beat slice-rank: search for cross-slice cancellations / shared factors to approach the true (unknown, overcomplete) tensor rank below the sum-of-slice-ranks bound
